    Serialized Form

    • Package util.wrapper

      • Class util.wrapper.BackgroundMusicTrack

        class BackgroundMusicTrack extends ArrayList<javafx.scene.media.MediaPlayer> implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • currentMusic
            javafx.scene.media.MediaPlayer currentMusic
            The currently active media player.
          • currentMusicIndex
            int currentMusicIndex
            The index of the currently playing music media.
          • medias
            ArrayList<javafx.scene.media.Media> medias
            The list of media use as a source for media player
          • mode
            BackgroundMusicTrack.TrackMode mode
            The playback mode of the music track.
          • name
            String name
            The name of the music track.
